experience.title: MERN Stack Developer Intern
highlights: Building scalable full-stack web applications using MERN Stack and TypeScript
Developing admin dashboards for user, content, and application management
Implementing JWT-based authentication and role-based access control (RBAC)
Integrating REST APIs for dynamic content and collaborating in Agile teams

fullstack.summary: Final-year B.Tech CSE student currently interning as a MERN Stack Developer at MAYASABHAXR Technologies. Hands-on experience building scalable full-stack applications with React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, MySQL, Firebase, and REST APIs. Built 20+ real-world projects including admin dashboards, RBAC systems, AI-integrated web apps, and developer productivity tools.
fullstack.skills: React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, MySQL, Firebase, REST APIs, JWT, NestJS, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Flask (Python), HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), Bootstrap, Chart.js, Git, GitHub, Vercel, Render

dataScience.summary: Final-year B.Tech CSE student with hands-on expertise in Python, SQL, Machine Learning, and Business Intelligence. Built 8+ real-world ML projects including predictive models (78–85% accuracy), ensemble systems, and GenAI solutions. Won Kaggle Bronze Medal (Road Accident Risk Prediction). Specialized in data visualization, ETL pipelines, feature engineering, and automation reducing manual effort by 20–60%.
